exampleSentences: Anh đã đọc hơn ngàn trang sách trong tháng này.
Chị có ngàn lý do để yêu thành phố này.
Em mơ ước được đi du lịch khắp ngàn nơi trên thế giới.
notes:
ngàn means thousand (1,000). It can be exact (1,000) or used loosely to mean “a lot / thousands of.”

It goes before a classifier + noun, like other numbers.  

It’s also used for emphasis to show a very big number, not always exactly 1,000.

North–South note: In the North, people usually say nghìn; in the South, ngàn is more common.

definitions.es: Una unidad de medida igual a mil.
definitions.vi: Một đơn vị đo lường bằng một nghìn.
definitions.en: A unit of measurement equal to one thousand.

example.vi: Có hàng ngàn bông hoa trong vườn.
example.es: Hay miles de flores en el jardín.
example.en: There are thousands of flowers in the garden.

translation.en: I have a thousand dong in my wallet.

exampleSentencesTranslated: I have read more than a thousand pages of books this month.
I have a thousand reasons to love this city.
I dream of traveling to a thousand places around the world.
notes_md:
**ngàn** means **thousand (1,000)**. It can be exact (1,000) or used loosely to mean “a lot / thousands of.”

It goes before a classifier + noun, like other numbers.  

It’s also used for emphasis to show a very big number, not always exactly 1,000.

North–South note: In the North, people usually say **nghìn**; in the South, **ngàn** is more common.

content.sentence: Tôi đã chạy ___ bước trong công viên.

translation.en: I ran a thousand steps in the park.
